caption: A man wearing a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt and a lanyard stands on a stage in front of a large projection screen. He is gesturing with his hands as he gives a presentation. The screen initially displays a dark blue background with a network graphic and the text "CRYPTO-ML LTD.", "Let's jump the hype-train!", "A large scale crypto-analysis platform", "Heavy compute data analysis, Transform, Fetch...", "Going deep running predictions on LSTMs", and "CAN WE SURVIVE THE 2017 CRYPTO-CRAZE?". Below the screen, a white banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018". As the presentation progresses, the screen content shifts to focus on "THE DATASET", accompanied by the text "All historical data from top 100 cryptos" and "Data goes from beginning to 09/2017 563871 daily-price (close) points", while the man continues to stand and speak.
